# StdioClientTransportOptions.ShutdownGraceMs property

Milliseconds to wait for the child to exit after stdin is closed before forcibly terminating it (spec §8.6.2-a step 3, §8.6.3-a). Defaults to 5000.

```csharp
public int ShutdownGraceMs { get; set; }
```
